since_last: 56% of 86 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.25%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC -3.00% · Gold -2.47% · Nasdaq100 +0.48%. 56% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.25%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.25%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.78%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +7.28%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +7.28%, ZBRA +4.59%, PINS +4.12%, WDAY +4.11%, PATH +3.89%. Laggards: SMR -4.42%, OKLO -4.19%, OKLO -4.19%, QCOM -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.25% at $158.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
